_comment: PUBLIC cross-table showcase (table mode). The corpus documents foreign keys ONLY on the child side, so the parent tables' INBOUND references can only be reconstructed by v3's cross-table concept aggregation. Scores users + posts_questions on inbound refs.
grounding: Local markdown corpus (eval/corpora/stackoverflow_xref); FKs documented child-side only.

run._doc: Runnable CASE: schema-only replica of bigquery-public-data.stackoverflow, enrich the parent tables in table mode grounded by the child-side-only corpus.

golden_facts: is referenced as the author of questions and answers via posts_questions.owner_user_id and posts_answers.owner_user_id
is referenced by comments.user_id as the comment author
is referenced by badges.user_id as the badge recipient
reputation is the user's core earned trust score; up_votes and down_votes are the votes this user has cast
is answered by rows in posts_answers, which reference it via posts_answers.parent_id
is referenced by votes.post_id and comments.post_id (votes and comments attach to it)
owner_user_id references users.id (the asker) and accepted_answer_id references posts_answers.id
